title: Grav-press bandage cuff
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Grav-press bandage cuffs''' were used to stop bleeding in limbs. Some of them were made by [[Sluissi]]. They used micro-[[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsor]] fields to stop arterial bleeding.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]''

[[Category:Bandages]]
